title: vigna radiata var. sublobata
intro: Vigna radiata var. sublobata, also known as adzuki bean or red mung bean, is a type of legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vigna radiata var. sublobata include reducing cholesterol levels, regulating blood sugar levels, and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include making a decoction by boiling the beans in water, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application to treat various skin conditions.
